description: A mugshot-collage propaganda card on a blue mottled/grunge background. Five real detainee/booking photos of men (mostly Hispanic) are styled as overlapping white-framed Polaroid snapshots scattered across the frame, each captioned in handwritten-style black marker with an alleged crime: 'AGGRAVATED ASSAULT,' 'PROSTITUTION,' 'ILLEGAL REENTRY & DUI,' 'DUI,' and 'ASSAULT X3 & DUI.' A dark diagonal banner across the upper left reads in white 'EX 41 arrested in sex trafficking op.' The lower left carries the DHS seal, the white serif 'ICE' wordmark, a red bar with white bold 'LEARN MORE,' and the URL 'ICE.gov/newsroom.' Propaganda technique: bundles individual arrestees from a Dallas-area strip-club anti-trafficking operation into a casual scrapbook layout that personalizes offenders and emphasizes a high arrest count, framing the operation as a major public-safety win. Target audience: the general public/social-media followers.
notable_text: 41 arrested in sex trafficking op; AGGRAVATED ASSAULT; PROSTITUTION; ILLEGAL REENTRY & DUI; DUI; ASSAULT X3 & DUI; ICE LEARN MORE ICE.gov/newsroom
